title: amaryllis × lateritia
intro: Amaryllis × lateritia, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross-breeding of Amaryllis belladonna and Hippeastrum, is known for its vibrant and showy flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Amaryllis × lateritia is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, used in traditional herbal remedies to create tonics and teas.
